title: Friends Config
description: This Project adds new items and Commands.
body:
This Project adds new items and Commands. If you're looking for fun, you can download it, but it's most fun when there are two of you.
With this mod you can have fun or use it for servers. Have fun with it!

**The Forge version is no longer up to date!**

### New Things:
- Armor Trim Recipes.
- New commands.
- The "Unheil" Biom.
- The ‘???’ Block that gives you the Red Gem(with an achievement).
- New Villigar(4).
- New Traids.
- New achievement.
- New Items: Red,green,yellow and the Blue Gem; Mond Sword + Upgrades; Head sword.
- New Recipes.
- A new Mob (The 'Unheil 4' Player).
- Ausserdem fügt die Mod eine neue art des Totem raids mit dem Totem Meister der mit der Totem  Flasche I beschworen werden kann.


  
- **But the language of all Items are German!**

![Op Item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d15563f1ce752ea866abb1c8f9753066ff1bd5b1.png)

Very fun!😃
___________________________________________________________________________________________________

## You can download the mod for MC Friends here!

https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-config#download

### This is how it works:

1. download

2. copy the mod

3. go to the bar and then ‘%appdata%’.

4. go to .minecraft

5. go to mods

6. delete the older version of the mod

7. paste the copied mod.
